\begin{flushleft}\footnotesize
$\Lambda$ is the aggregate separation ratio 
$\Lambda = (\sum_g \pi_g D_g)/(\sum_g \pi_g W_g)$. 
Values equal to 1 indicate no excess separation; values above 1 indicate that outgroup consensuses are farther away than the ingroup consensus, relative to within-group dispersion.
\end{flushleft}
\end{table}
